---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the project
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about behavior, API, or UI.

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Impact

- [ ] User-facing (dashboard / chat)
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance / reliability

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or examples of similar features in other projects.
